summary: Informational website for Ghuge Medicals Pharmaceutical Distributors. Single-page site with About Us, mission statement ('To maintain the health of Madha Taluka'), pharmaceutical partner logos (Aqualab, Smartway, Laborate, Cipla, Smartlab, Smart Iconic), and contact details. Blue and green color scheme.
architectural_notes: Single informational page (no routing needed) — About Us, Mission, Partner Logos, Contact sections
Color scheme: friendly blue and green tones
Pharmaceutical partner logos sourced from network/public URLs; use branded placeholder tiles as fallback

existing_features.title: Add a 'Our Pharmaceutical Partners' section to the existing Ghuge Medicals website that displays branded logo tiles for the following companies: Aqualab, Smartway, Laborate, Cipla, Smartlab, and Smart Iconic. Use publicly available logo image URLs from the web where possible; where a reliable URL is unavailable, render a styled branded tile with the company name using the site's blue and green color scheme.
